Created attachment 162695
piwik update patch

There is new version of www/piwik. It's mainly security update and some other small issues.

I've made a patch (see attachement). Also I've tested it in poudriere. The log is available at https://rtm.bsdserwis.com/poudriere/data/a1amd64-testing/2015-10-30_13h48m48s/logs/piwik-2.15.0.log
